code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
mut cur = ""
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
for t in tokens
  if not has_prev or t != prev
    result = list.push(result, t)
    has_prev = true
    prev = t
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in result
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
print(out)
